hooks.command: git config user.email | grep -q 'community@thescla.org' && echo '{"systemMessage": "✓ Authenticated as community-SCLA (community@thescla.org)"}' || echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ WARNING: This workspace is configured for community-SCLA. Git user is not set to community@thescla.org. Run: git config user.email community@thescla.org and git config user.name \"SCLA Community\""}'
